name: golang-github-hetznercloud-hcloud-go-dev
title: golang-github-hetznercloud-hcloud-go-dev
summary: library for the Hetzner Cloud API
description:
library for the Hetzner Cloud API
This package is a library written in Go for the Hetzner Cloud API
Build status.
.
The Hetzner Cloud API operates over HTTPS and uses JSON as its data
format. The API is a RESTful API and utilizes HTTP methods and HTTP
status codes to specify requests and responses.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-hetznercloud-hcloud-go-dev because library for the Hetzner Cloud API.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-hetznercloud-hcloud-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-hetznercloud-hcloud-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-hetznercloud-hcloud-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
